body_txt: This trope is when a character has access to a large amount of food that is intended to be eaten by a group, but ends up eating all of it by themselves. Usually, they'll start just intending to eat a small amount, either as a snack or just to taste it. However, they end up eating more and more of it over time until they have unintentionally consumed all of it. This is a downside of being a Big Eater . Compare I'll Take Two Beers Too , Ate the Plate , and Cut a Slice, Take the Rest . The Fat Comic Relief is prone to this type of gag. This does not apply to situations where a character simply eats a lot of food.
